fields.summary: TC-005: Login fails when multilingual credentials are used
fields.description:
Login validation does not handle Unicode inputs such as Arabic or Chinese characters.

*Steps to Reproduce:*
1. Navigate to https://app.vwo.com
2. Enter Arabic email (مستخدم@مثال.كوم)
3. Enter Chinese characters as password (测试@例子.com)
4. Click Login

*Expected Result:*
System should reject multilingual credentials gracefully.

*Actual Result:*
Login validation fails with ❌ SYSTEM CRASH: 500 Internal Server Error — Unhandled Unicode Exception in backend validation module.

*Environment:*
- URL: https://app.vwo.com
- Browser: Chromium
- Automation Framework: Playwright MCP
